submission.name: Initech Summarizer
submission.description: A meeting-notes summarizer. Region eu-central-1, approved. PII is not processed because transcripts are anonymized upstream. Retention 14 days. Encryption in transit enabled. Model family disclosed (gpt-style). Does not train on customer data. Subprocessors listed and vetted. Human reviews summaries before distribution.
submission.intended_use: Generating draft summaries of internal meetings for an assigned note-taker to edit.
